de.uka.ilkd.key.util

Class ProofStarter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.ProofStarter

  • public class ProofStarter
extends Object
    This class encapsulates the registration of a proof for a given problem. It then starts a proof attempt. After the proof attempt stops (successfully or not) the side proof is by default unregistered, but can be accessed via this class.
    Author:
    Richard Bubel

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes

      Proof obligation for a given formula or sequent
